canonical_name: that place where once she had held high state
two of those she had loved best
the maiden who fell in love with a wild beast from the depths of the forest
the daughter she had never had
the psalmist who told us to praise God with the lute and the harp
a servant in the dress of the court
one fully trained priestess in Avalon whom the Merlin would not know by sight
that ancient bard who could play till the trees danced
all our maids with mops and brooms
all of Gwenhwyfar's handsomest young knights
those who knew her in the world
